name: Comfort Pro Heating, Cooling & Plumbing
services: Indoor air quality (UV lights, air scrubbers)
serviceArea: Greater Phoenix metro area (within ~30 miles of Phoenix, AZ)

faqs.q: How quickly can you come out?
faqs.a: For emergencies we offer same-day response 24/7. Standard appointments are typically available next business day.
We serve the Greater Phoenix metro area within about 30 miles of Phoenix, including Scottsdale, Mesa, Chandler, Gilbert, Glendale, Peoria, Surprise, Goodyear, Tempe, and surrounding cities.

faqs.q: What brands do you work on?
faqs.a: We service all major HVAC brands including Trane, Carrier, Lennox, Goodman, Rheem, York, and American Standard, as well as all major plumbing brands.
Yes! Our annual tune-up plan covers one AC check in spring and one heating check in fall, with priority scheduling and discounted repairs.
Yes, we offer financing options on new equipment installations. Ask your technician for details.

faqs.q: How hot does it get and does that affect my AC?
faqs.a: Phoenix summers regularly hit 110°F+. We recommend AC tune-ups every spring before the heat arrives, and most systems need refrigerant checks and filter changes more frequently in our climate.
